items.name: herbert-rs
items.description: Local LLM inference engine written from scratch in Rust — hand-written AVX-512 assembly kernels, Metal & Vulkan compute shaders. Supports Qwen3, Mistral3, ... Q4/INT8/BF16 quantization.

items.name: lmdeploy-v100
items.description: This project is specifically developed for V100, based on lmdeploy 0.12.1, and supports mainstream open-source models from Q4 2025 to Q1 2026. It does not account for compatibility with other architectures and has only been tested on an 8-card V100 32GB setup.
